titleStmt.title: SII 20.218: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 218. (B.K. No. 79 of 1937-38.) ṬĀKAḶI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab built into the plinth of the local mosque.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription in Nāgari script and Sanskrit language opens with the Vachana of Kapilasiddha-Mallikārjuna and gives the genealogy of the Yādava kings upto Kannara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
1 © . svasti śrī vaṁde taṁ kapilasiddha mallikārjunamīśvaraṁ . ya
2 tpādakaṁjakiṁjalkaṁ rañjayaṁti jagatrayī . Ōṁṁ jayatu parameśvaraḥ
3 paramātmeśvaraḥ saharṣasotsavaḥ susūkṣma Ekavarṇyo bhūtvā yogināṁ
4 mānasāgne yo viśvarūpo vṛṣasvarūpī yajamānasyācāryasya svaya
5 meva bhūtvā yogādikalājñānaṁ sarvvaṁ saṁpādya yogaramaṇīya
6 kṣetraṁ sṛsthiraṁ sthāpayitvā śalākāṁ gṛhītvā navyaśrīśaila kṛ
7 tvā kapilasiddhamallikārjunadeva Eva sthirataraṁ sthitvā puṁ
8 ṇyapāpe samahūya samādiśati . te Ūcaturbho deva kiṁ karta
9 vyamiti . Evamukte Asmin sthāne sarvvamānyaṁ kṛtvā deśāngrāmā
10 nu bhūmīrdhdhanāni cāsmai liṁgāya hastodakaṁ kṛtvā dattāni mana
11 si jugupsāṁ vihāya gṛhṇāmīti bruvāṇaṁ tasya mātaraṁ mātāpitaraṁ
12 pitṛjātaṁ sarvvaṁ saptasaptātikoṭivarṣaparyataṁ kṛmikuṁḍamadhye pra
13 kṣipya tvamāhutiṁ gṛhṇan tiṣṭha re pāpa . Asya devasya bhūdhanebhyo .
14 bimemyahamiti sarppaveṣṭita Iva manasi cakicakitaṁ vegāṁnama
15 skurvāṇamahikabhogamabhilaṣitaṁ dattvā dīrghāyuṣaṁ kṛtvā gacha
16 re puṇya kailāsaṁ . Iti dvayanyāyānyāyamanu puṇyapāpe prekṣa
17 māṇe tau dvau nayata nayata na skhalati tathyaṁ tathyaṁ satyaṁ pasyata bho ©
18 svasti śrī somavaṁśasabhūtabhūpāḥ somasamaprabhāḥ . rākāśaśāṁ
19 kasaṁkāśo yadustatra mahānṛpaḥ . tasyāsti vaṁśo vistīrṇasta
20 dguṇā kena varṇyate . yatra nārāyaṇaśrīmānprītyā prādurbhabhū
21 va saḥ . śrīmajyādavavaṁśavārddhijanitaśrīmallugiścaṁdramāśrīmāṁ
22 ścāmaragaṁganirjjaragaja . śrīmajjetugijaṁga
23 mo'marataruḥ śrī cī liṁgitaḥ . śrīmatsiṁghaṇadeva
24 kaustubhamaṇiśrībhāratīvallabhaḥ tatputro jaitugirnnāma kāmi
25 nījanavallabhaḥ . tasyātmajaṁ rājarājaṁ kaṁnharaṁ kulabhūṣaṇaṁ . ca
26 turddikcakramākrāṁtaṁ dṛṣṭvā kaṁnhamahīpatiṁ . tatkīrtimatsarā
27 tsatpavāddhīnākramya varddhate . tatra . samastavasuṁdharāvallabhāpara
28 nārīdurllabhā kīrtigaruḍadhvaja . dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvara . vasīThe continuation is broken away and
Digital edition of SII 20.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
